name: tidal-verovio-forwarder
description: Forward flagged TidalCycles score lines from Pulsar to the Tidal VexFlow performer bridge.

autoSendOnSave.description: Send the active .tidal buffer to the bridge whenever it is saved.

autoSendOnChange.description: Send the active .tidal buffer to the bridge shortly after each edit.

autoSendDebounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before auto-send-on-change fires.

syncOnTidalEvaluation.description: Automatically sync the score clock when a Tidal evaluation command is dispatched in Pulsar.

syncAfterEvaluationDelayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between a Tidal evaluation command and the score sync message.

tidalEvaluationCommandPattern.description: Regular expression used to detect Pulsar commands that evaluate Tidal code.
